creator: kamaletdinov@esc-kazan.ru
text:
We are using FreeBSD 6.1 and acquired problem.

We have JMicron sofware raid controller and when I'm tryind to install
FreeBSD on Raid-0 array it's tells me that there is no hard drives founded.

BIOS works with next setups:
JMicron RAID controller -- Raid
SATA controller -- enabled
SATA controller mode -- RAID
